content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: allow_skew
P: raise_window ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ reg_test
V: edge_ts_accepted ∧ stale_still_"401" ∧ min_fix
A: widen_skew ∧ clamp_provider ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: allow_skew.
Plan: raise_window and provider_skew_only and reg_test.
Verify: edge_ts_accepted and stale_still_"401" and min_fix.
Answer target: widen_skew and clamp_provider and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: overdue ∧ "402" ∧ "24h"
P: grace_window ∧ boundary_guard ∧ single_emit
V: no_loop ∧ "402"_once ∧ "24h"_exact
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ ship

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready
P: fast_delivery ∧ low_ops ∧ audit_boundaries
V: bounded_modules ∧ single_db ∧ shared_deploy ∧ extract_later
A: ship_monolith ∧ enforce_module_seams ∧ log_audit_trail ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: capsule_arch
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops
P: worker_sidecar ∧ async_enrichment ∧ pg_queue
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ ops_simple
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: prevent_path_traversal
P: reject ∧ ".." ∧ resolve_path ∧ enforce_baseDir
V: test ∧ ".." ∧ test_symlink ∧ test_absolute
A: patch_handler ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: prevent_path_traversal.
Plan: reject and ".." and resolve_path and enforce_baseDir.
Verify: test and ".." and test_symlink and test_absolute.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_tests and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection ∧ unsanitized_input ∧ order_by_injection
V: whitelist_sort ∧ parameterize ∧ validate_column
A: reject_pr ∧ patch_query ∧ add_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection and unsanitized_input and order_by_injection.
Verify: whitelist_sort and parameterize and validate_column.
Answer target: reject_pr and patch_query and add_tests.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor ∧ reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor and reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: uses_"async" ∧ uses_"await" ∧ order_preserved
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
V: db_err→"next(err)" ∧ next_on_success ∧ minimal_change
A: async_await ∧ anchors_verbatim ∧ no_logic_drift

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: uses_"async" and uses_"await" and order_preserved.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log.
Verify: db_err then "next(err)" and next_on_success and minimal_change.
Answer target: async/await and anchors_verbatim and no_logic_drift.
